packages.name: RDF Store (oxigraph)
packages.description: In-browser RDF triple store with full SPARQL 1.1 support. Compiled into the base wellfare-core WASM — always available, no download required.

packages.name: Prolog Reasoning Engine
packages.description: SWI-Prolog compiled to WebAssembly. Enables differential diagnosis evaluation, welfare eligibility rule checking, and clinical logic evaluation entirely within your browser.

packages.name: On-device LLM — MediaPipe / LiteRT
packages.description: Runs a language model fully on your device using Google's MediaPipe LiteRT framework. Enables paper extraction, document ingestion, and natural language explanations. Optimised for Android Chrome with GPU acceleration. Requires a one-time model download (~1.3 GB).

models.name: Gemma 2B IT — GPU, int4 (recommended)
models.description: Google Gemma 2B Instruction Tuned, 4-bit quantized for GPU acceleration. Best quality on Android with GPU. Requires accepting Gemma licence on Kaggle.

models.name: Gemma 2B IT — CPU, int4
models.description: Google Gemma 2B Instruction Tuned, 4-bit quantized for CPU. Use if GPU acceleration is unavailable or causing issues.

packages.name: On-device LLM — NVIDIA / CUDA
packages.description: Future support for NVIDIA GPU-accelerated inference on desktop. Not yet implemented.
